title: tetranthera lancifolia var. glaucophylla
intro: Tetranthera lancifolia var. glaucophylla, also known as the Glaucous-leafed Tetranthera, is a plant species belonging to the Magnoliaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetranthera lancifolia var. glaucophylla include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
